tracks.rawText: 2:55AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05 (Vocals)v5.5CoverCore sound: Genre-fluid sonic architecture blending reggae-dub, techno, electronic, and global rhythms, Built around groove, emotional impact, and cinematic atmosphere, designed for both dancefloor energy and deep listening experiences, Lyrics & mood: Hybrid storytelling that moves between introspection, sensuality, ambition, and transcendence, Hooks are immediate and memorable, often chant-driven, with a balance between poetic depth and viral simplicity, Production palette: Deep sub-bass, textured percussion, offbeat grooves, evolving synthscapes, and spatial FX (delay, reverb, modulation), Frequent use of contrast: minimal vs explosive, silence vs impact, analog warmth vs futuristic digital textures, Language & vocals: Bilingual flow (English/Spanish) with global accessibility, Vocals range from melodic, hypnotic singing to rhythmic, charismatic delivery, Focus on identity, tone, and presence over perfection, Artistic direction: Not bound to genres — each track is a world, Design3PublishRemix
tracks.title: AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05 (Vocals)

tracks.rawText: 2:46AUDIO-2026-05-13-11-11-05 (Vocals)v5.5CoverReggaeton with a heavy dembow rhythm at 95 BPM in G minor, The track features a deep, sub-heavy kick drum and a crisp snare hitting the classic 3+3+2 pattern, A dark, minor-key synth bass follows the kick rhythm, A repetitive, high-pitched staccato synth lead provides a melodic hook, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic rap style with heavy compression and short delay, Occasional record scratches and vocal ad-libs punctuate the transitions, The arrangement is sparse, focusing on the interplay between the vocal flow and the percussive drive8PublishRemix
